channel.title: INtopBackup
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtopBackup, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Refugees in the U.S. could be arrested under a new immigration memo
item.description: The move is another Trump administration effort to limit legal pathways to migration or resettlement, after already curbing the number of admitted ref...

item.title: 1,000 Kenyans were recruited to fight for Russia in Ukraine, intelligence report says
item.description: A new Kenyan intelligence report said the Kenyans were recruited to fight for Russia in Ukraine after being misled with false promises of jobs in Russ...

item.title: 'Dude, good luck': the Olympic wit and wisdom of a pioneering African skeleton racer
item.description: Who says serious athletes are always serious? Akwasi Frimpong, who's competed for Ghana, is a world-class wisecracker as he reflects on being a Black ...

item.title: Police arrest Ex-Prince Andrew. And, Trump hosts the first Board of Peace meeting
item.description: U.K. police arrested Former Prince Andrew today on suspicion of misconduct in public office, U.K. media reports. And, President Trump is hosting the f...

item.title: HUD rule could push families with undocumented immigrants out of their homes
item.description: A proposed rule could put nearly 80,000 people at risk of eviction, many of them U.S. citizen children. Undocumented immigrants don't get rental aid b...

item.title: Over 1,000 Kenyans enlisted to fight in Russia-Ukraine war, report says
item.description: Investigators call the recruitment a well-organised trafficking ring involving immigration staff and security agencies.

item.title: Men wrongfully accused of yogurt shop murders seek formal exoneration
item.description: One of the four men who was initially convicted was sent to death row in the killing of four teenagers in a crime that haunted Austin for decades.

item.title: Skiers with roots in Lake Tahoeâs alpine community among the 8 killed in California avalanche
item.description: The victims of a deadly avalanche in Californiaâs Sierra Nevada include a group connected to a skiing academy near Lake Tahoe.

item.title: Eight skiers found dead after California avalanche
item.description: Fifteen skiers went missing on Tuesday following a massive avalanche in California's Lake Tahoe region. One person remains missing but is presumed dea...

item.title: Suspected carbon-monoxide leak kills at least 30 miners in Nigeria, witnesses say
item.description: The workers are believed to have collapsed after the gas built up in poorly ventilated tunnels.

item.title: Desperate hunt for breakthrough in Nancy Guthrie case turns to Mexico
item.description: The search for the 84-year-old mother of US presenter Savannah Guthrie has moved into a third week.

item.title: Woman accused of using ChatGPT to plan drug murders
item.description: The 21-year-old woman is accused by authorities in South Korea of secretly administering drinks containing drugs to three men in their 20s.

item.title: FBI in touch with Mexico about Nancy Guthrie's disappearance, sources say
item.description: The FBI has been in touch with the Mexican government and Mexican law enforcement regarding the disappearance of Nancy Guthrie, law enforcement source...

item.title: Former Prince Andrew arrested over Epstein files revelations
item.description: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, King Charles III's younger brother, has been arrested over suspected misconduct in public office after revelations in the ...

item.title: Scores of U.S. warplanes head for key bases amid standoff with Iran
item.description: As Trump pressures Iran, he's spoken of an "armada" heading for the Mideast, but there's another massive movement of American fire power in the air.

item.title: Snow drought helped set the stage for deadly California avalanche, leading to unstable conditions
U.N. nuclear chief warns of 2 major risks if U.S.-Iran deal not reached
item.description: The head of the U.N. nuclear watchdog agency says Iran's enriched uranium "is still there," as he stresses the urgency of diplomacy to avert a U.S.-Ir...

item.title: The backcountry ski trip hit by avalanche was led by an outfit offering mountain adventures globally
